title: St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé
tagline: St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Teresa's Shrine Basilica, Mahe (French: Basilica Sanctuaire de Sainte Thérèse) is a Catholic shrine to Saint Teresa of Ávila in Mahe, Puducherry. It is one of the most-visited shrines in India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mahé, India
topPlaces.description: Mahé (English: /mɑːˈheɪ, ˈmɑːhiː/, French: [mɑˈe]), also known as Mayyazhi (Malayalam: [mɐjːɐɻi]), is a municipality and small town in the Mahe district of the Puducherry Union Territory. It is situated at the mouth of the Mahe River and is surrounded by the State of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kallayi
topPlaces.description: Kallai (or Kallayi) is a suburb of Kozhikode on the banks of Kallai River which links with the Chaliyar river on the south by a man-made canal. It is in the Kozhikode district of Kerala in south India and is noted for timber trading.

topPlaces.name: Mahé River
topPlaces.description: The Mahe River () natively Mayyazhipuzha (Malayalam: [mɐjːɐɻipːuɻɐ]) is a river in South India. It flows through the state of Kerala and the coastal exclave of Mahe in Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Choodikotta
topPlaces.description: Choodikotta is an enclave in the Mahe district of Puducherry and a part of the Mahé municipality.

topPlaces.name: Manjakkal
topPlaces.description: Manjakkal is a ward of Mahé municipality. It forms a part of the enclave Mahe district of Puducherry in India.

topPlaces.name: Mahe Lighthouse
topPlaces.description: Mahe Lighthouse is a lighthouse situated on the south side of the entrance of Mayyazhi river in Mahe, Puducherry. It was established in the year 1893.

topPlaces.name: New Mahe
topPlaces.description: New Mahe is a census town and suburb of Thalassery City in the Kannur district of Kerala, India. It is geographically in Kerala but near Mahe, Pondicherry.

topPlaces.name: Cherukallayi
topPlaces.description: Cherukallayi is a revenue village which forms part of the municipality of Mahe in Puducherry, India.

items.note: Mahé (English: /mɑːˈheɪ, ˈmɑːhiː/, French: [mɑˈe]), also known as Mayyazhi (Malayalam: [mɐjːɐɻi]), is a municipality and small town in the Mahe district of the Puducherry Union Territory. It is situated at the mouth of the Mahe River and is surrounded by the State of Kerala.

Kallai (or Kallayi) is a suburb of Kozhikode on the banks of Kallai River which links with the Chaliyar river on the south by a man-made canal. It is in the Kozhikode district of Kerala in south India and is noted for timber trading.
The Mahe River () natively Mayyazhipuzha (Malayalam: [mɐjːɐɻipːuɻɐ]) is a river in South India. It flows through the state of Kerala and the coastal exclave of Mahe in Puducherry.
Choodikotta is an enclave in the Mahe district of Puducherry and a part of the Mahé municipality.
Manjakkal is a ward of Mahé municipality. It forms a part of the enclave Mahe district of Puducherry in India.
Mahe Lighthouse is a lighthouse situated on the south side of the entrance of Mayyazhi river in Mahe, Puducherry. It was established in the year 1893.
New Mahe is a census town and suburb of Thalassery City in the Kannur district of Kerala, India. It is geographically in Kerala but near Mahe, Pondicherry.
Cherukallayi is a revenue village which forms part of the municipality of Mahe in Puducherry, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (138 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé?
faq.a: Stays in St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Teresa’s Shrine, Mahé?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahé, India, Kallayi, Mahé River, Choodikotta, Manjakkal.
